Amid this industrial drabness, the banners of the immigrant associations snap in the heavy harbor wind—a brilliant, defiant mosaic of vermilion, imperial gold, and jade green that cuts through the iron fog. It is a sprawling visual ledger of the sheer multitude your kin gathered here, thousands of souls whose survival now leans upon the iron bone and discipline of the {family_name} name.

Down in the packed dirt of the public square, hundreds of upturned faces form a pale, dense mosaic, their eyes locked on the elevated timber platform where your pupils snap through their forms, their cotton trousers cracking like pistol shots with every thrust. Standing at the margin of this crowd is the municipal magistrate, a silhouette of severe, broadcloth black among the shimmering, embroidered silks of the neighborhood elders. From this height, you can see his narrow eyes tracing the clean, terrifying precision of your men’s iron limbs, his hand hovering over his waistcoat as he tallies whether this guild is an instrument to quiet the docks or a weapon designed to break his administration's grip.

Through the glass, you track the twitch of the magistrate’s fingers near his fob watch, his gaze shifting from the raw brawn on stage to the municipal insignia on his collar, measuring how easily an official nod could grant legitimacy or a swift stroke of his pen could shutter your gates.

choice.text: Present the gym as a patriotic civic club to win municipal funding and legitimacy.

prose: Your eyes drift past the black-coated authority to the snapping vermilion silks of the district, where the elders nod in quiet unison, their hopes anchored not in the fickle laws of the city but in the hard, unyielding knuckles of their own blood.

choice.text: Keep the guild's focus entirely internal, building a self-reliant defensive league.

decision.prompt: How will the {family_name} line use its athletic dominance to secure its place in the city's future?

options.text: Incorporate the guild as a commercial athletic association, targeting the city's rising middle class.
Form an alliance with local labor unions, using your athletes as the physical shield of the working class.
Establish a private academy, reserving your techniques and power strictly for those of true lineage.

prose: The tongue remembers what the belly used to crave, coating the palate now in the heavy, rendering fat of twice-cooked pork belly and the dark, caramelized sugar of plums reduced over wood coal. That sweet glaze sticks to the teeth, chased by the dry, smoke-cured astringency of roasted oolong that leaves the throat clean but marked. It is the flavor of survival turned to dominance—a far cry from the sour, watered congee that once barely kept the ribs from collapsing in your first lean winters here. Every heavy earthenware platter cleared from the long table is a physical receipt of your labor, validating the bruises earned on the canvas and the hard silver now accumulating in the brass-bound chests of the {family_name} name.

You pour the dark infusion for your heir, watching the black tea leaves swirl and settle at the bottom of the cup like tea-dregs of old wisdom. The initial sip is punishingly bitter, a sharp bite that puckers the mouth before blooming into a clean, mineral sweetness that lingers long after the swallow. This is the inheritance you pass across the stained oak: not merely the keys to the training hall or the contracts of the association, but the iron-willed discipline that keeps a body upright when the world demands it bend. The young one lifts the cup with hands already calloused at the knuckles, drinking deep and absorbing the bitter lesson without a single flinch, ready to carry the lineage through the grinding machinations of the coming decade.
The thick, syrupy residue of the plum glaze remains on your tongue, a rich reminder that influence is bought with gold and secured with full bellies.

choice.text: Counsel your heir to focus on wealth and the consolidation of your holdings.

prose: The tongue-parching dryness of the charcoal-roasted tea leaves a clean slate, reminding you that physical mastery and unbroken lineage outlast any fleeting coin.

choice.text: Counsel your heir to prioritize honor and the preservation of the family's physical traditions.
